name: George Jessel
description: American actor, singer, songwriter, film producer (1898-1981)
abstract: George Albert "Georgie" Jessel (April 3, 1898 – May 23, 1981) was an American actor, singer, songwriter, and film producer. He was famous in his lifetime as a multitalented comedic entertainer, achieving a level of recognition that transcended his limited roles in movies.

works.t: Will You Love Me in December as You Do in May?

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: I can take Paul Small next and Finkelhoff, they were agents for a show called "Curtain Time," "Laugh Time" and "Show Time." These are different shows that they put on that we were in with them where we had Connie Boswell, Jack Haley. We had George Jessel

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Green
about_quotes.evidence: I mean even -- we got one of the greats now, I mean they call him the toastmaster. What you call -- George Jessel.
